title: Ukubambisana Nokungqubuzana Emngceleni WaseKapa
subject: History
caps_topic: Cooperation and conflict on the frontiers of the Cape Colony in the early 19th century

slides.title: Ukubambisana Nokungqubuzana Emngceleni WaseKapa
slides.lead: Indlela imiphakathi yamaXhosa, ama-trekboer (abalimi bezinkomo abangamaBhunu), amaNgisi kanye nabefundisi bevangeli abahlangana ngayo, bahwebelana futhi baxabana emngceleni waseMpumalanga Koloni (Eastern Cape) ekuqaleni kwawo-1800.

media.alt: Umfula oluhlaza ophulukundlela phakathi kwezindawo ezimbili, enye inezinkomo enye inenqola, ehlangana emngceleni.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='320' height='62' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 118 L60 96 L120 112 L180 90 L250 110 L320 92 L320 118 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M150 40 q10 40 -6 70 q-14 26 4 70' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='7' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='250' cy='44' r='22' fill='#e8a13a'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='138' rx='12' ry='7' fill='#5c3a22'/><rect x='214' y='128' width='34' height='14' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='220' cy='146' r='5' fill='#3a2a1a'/><circle cx='242' cy='146' r='5' fill='#3a2a1a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Beka isimo: 'umngcele' (frontier) awuwona nje umugqa emephini kodwa yindawo ebanzi lapho abantu abehlukene behlala eduze komunye nomunye, kwesinye isikhathi besizana kwesinye bexabana. Chaza ukuthi le yunithi ibheka umngcele waseMpumalanga Koloni (Eastern Cape) ekuqaleni kwawo-1800, cishe eduze koMfula iGreat Fish. Buza abafundi ukuthi bacabanga ukuthi kwenzekani lapho amaqembu amabili efuna umhlaba nomanzi afanayo.

slides.title: Umngcele waseMpumalanga Koloni (Eastern Cape)
slides.lead: Ngonyaka we-1800 iKoloni yaseKapa (Cape Colony) yase inwebeke iya empumalanga kwaze kwahlangana abalimi bamaDashi nemiphakathi yamaXhosa eduze koMfula iGreat Fish.

blocks.text: I-**Koloni yaseKapa (Cape Colony)** yaqala njengendawo yokuhlala yamaDashi eTable Bay ngo-1652. Phakathi neminyaka engaphezu kuka-150, abalimi bezinkomo ababebizwa ngokuthi ama-**trekboer** bathuthela kude kakhulu impumalanga befuna amadlelo. Ngo-1795, futhi nango-1806, i-**Britain (iNgilandi)** yathatha ikoloni.

items: Le ndawo yomngcele yayikwelaseMpumalanga Koloni (Eastern Cape) yanamuhla, eduze koMfula iGreat Fish.
Wawungewona umngcele omile - wawushintsha njengoba abantu behamba futhi kuliwa izimpi.
Amaqembu ahlukene abelana, aqhudelana futhi alwa ngomhlaba nomanzi afanayo.

media.alt: Imephu elula ekhombisa iKoloni yaseKapa entshonalanga nomhlaba wamaXhosa empumalanga, kwehlukaniswe uMfula iGreat Fish.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='10' y='20' width='104' height='120' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='126' y='20' width='104' height='120' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 18 q-8 40 4 62 q10 22 -4 62' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='6'/><text x='30' y='84' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#3a2a1a'>Cape</text><text x='24' y='98' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#3a2a1a'>Colony</text><text x='150' y='84' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#243318'>Xhosa</text><text x='152' y='98' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#243318'>land</text></svg>

slides.notes: Tholela abafundi umngcele endaweni nasesikhathini. Khomba emephini iMpumalanga Koloni (Eastern Cape) noMfula iGreat Fish. Gcizelela ukuthi umngcele wawulokhu uqhubeka nokuya empumalanga njengoba ikoloni yayikhula. Qaphela ushintsho lokusuka ekulawulweni ngamaDashi kuya kwamaNgisi, okwakubalulekile ngoba iBritain yaletha abahlali abasha nezinqubomgomo ezintsha emngceleni.

slides.title: Ubani owayehlala emngceleni?
slides.lead: Amaqembu ambalwa abelana ngendawo yomngcele, ngayinye inendlela yayo yokuphila.

blocks.heading: Imiphakathi yamaXhosa
blocks.text: Abalimi abafuya izinkomo abahlala ezizweni empumalanga koMfula iFish, beholwa yiziphathimandla ezinjengoNgqika noNdlambe.

blocks.heading: Ama-trekboer
blocks.text: Abalimi bezinkomo abakhuluma isiDashi abavela eKapa abathuthela empumalanga befuna amadlelo amasha.

blocks.heading: AmaKhoikhoi namaSan
blocks.text: Abelusi nabazingeli bokuqala baleyo ndawo, abaningi manje asebesebenza emapulazini ekoloni noma behlala phakathi kwamaXhosa.

blocks.heading: AmaNgisi nabefundisi bevangeli
blocks.text: Iziphathimandla zamaNgisi, amasosha kanye naBahlali baka-1820 (1820 Settlers), kanye nabefundisi bevangeli abafika bezofundisa nokuphendukisa abantu enkolweni.

slides.notes: Nika abafundi uhlu lwabalingiswa ngaphambi kokuba indaba iqhubeke. Gcizelela ukuthi amaXhosa ayengabalimi abanenqubo enamandla yezenhlalo nezombusazwe, hhayi nje 'abavimbe indlela' yabahlali. Qaphela ukuthi amaKhoikhoi namaSan ayevele elapho kudala ngaphambi kwawomabili la maqembu. Gwema ukuveza noma iliphi iqembu njengelihle ngokuphelele noma elibi ngokuphelele.

slides.title: Ukuhwebelana nokuhlalisana
slides.lead: Isikhathi esiningi, abantu bomngcele babebambisana ngoba babedingana.

blocks.text: Ukuphila emngceleni kwakungekhona nje kokulwa kuphela. Imiphakathi yamaXhosa nabakoloni **babehwebelana**, beshintshiselana ngezinkomo, izinyo lendlovu (ivory), ubuhlalu, ithusi, indwangu namathuluzi ensimbi. Abanye abantu babefunda izilimi zomunye nomunye, besebenza ndawonye baze bashadelana phakathi kwamaqembu.

items: Izinkomo zaziyingcebo kokubili kubalimi bamaXhosa nama-trekboer, ngakho babehwebelana beluse ndawonye.
Izisebenzi zamaKhoikhoi, abazingeli nabahwebi babevame ukuhamba phakathi kwemiphakathi yomibili.
Abefundisi bevangeli, iziphathimandla neziphathimandla ngezinye izikhathi babenza izivumelwano zokugcina ukuthula.

media.alt: Izandla ezimbili zishintshiselana ngezimpahla ngaphezu kwezinkomo ezimbili, kukhombisa ukuhweba.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 60 q30 -20 60 0' fill='none' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='9' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M120 60 q30 -20 60 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='9' stroke-linecap='round'/><circle cx='110' cy='58' r='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='118' rx='22' ry='12' fill='#5c3a22'/><ellipse cx='150' cy='118' rx='22' ry='12' fill='#8a6a44'/><path d='M52 108 q-6 -10 4 -12 M88 108 q6 -10 -4 -12' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi sithombe silinganisa indaba ukuze abafundi bangacabangi ukuthi umngcele wawugcwele udlame kuphela. Ubudlelwano bangempela - ukuhweba, umsebenzi, umshado, ukufunda izilimi - kwakuwela umngcele. Lokhu 'kubambisana' kuyingxenye eyodwa esihlokweni se-CAPS futhi kulula ukukudlula. Buza abafundi izibonelo zesimanje zamaqembu aqhudelanayo kanti abuye abambisane.

slides.title: Kungani ukungqubuzana kwakhula?
slides.lead: Izinto ezifanayo ababelana ngazo abantu - umhlaba, amanzi nezinkomo - yizo futhi ezabangela izingxabano zabo.

blocks.text: Njengoba kufika ama-trekboer amaningi kamuva nabahlali bamaNgisi, babefuna **umhlaba** namadlelo **okwelusa** engeziwe. Lokhu kwafinyelela emiphakathini yamaXhosa eyayivele isebenzisa lowo mhlaba. Uma izinkomo zinyamalala, iqembu ngalinye lalisola elinye, futhi ukweba okuncane kwakungakhula kube yimpi.

items: Womabili amaqembu ayefuya izinkomo, ngakho ukuqhudelana ngamadlelo kwakungapheli.
Ukwebiwa kwezinkomo yizinhlangothi zombili kwadala intukuthelo nokungathembani.
Uhulumeni wekoloni waqhubeka nokuzama ukumisa umngcele oqinile nokususa amaXhosa emhlabeni osentshonalanga kwawo.

media.alt: Inkomazi emaphakathi inemicibisholo emibili ehudulwa emaceleni ahlukene, kukhombisa ukuqhudelana.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='110' cy='84' rx='30' ry='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M92 70 q-6 -10 4 -12 M128 70 q6 -10 -4 -12' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M64 84 L20 84 M28 76 L20 84 L28 92' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M156 84 L200 84 M192 76 L200 84 L192 92' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/></svg>

slides.notes: Dweba imbangela nomphumela ngokucacile: ukwanda kwenani labahlali kanye nomnotho wezinkomo owabelwana ngawo kanye nomngcele oshintshashintshayo kwaholela ekungqubuzaneni. Veza ukuthi ukwebiwa kwezinkomo kwenzeka nhlangothi zombili - lokhu kubalulekile ekulinganiseni. Chaza ukuthi imizamo kahulumeni yokudweba umugqa oqinile, nokugcina amaXhosa ohlangothini olulodwa, yenza ukuthula kwaba nzima.

slides.title: Izimpi Zomngcele (Frontier Wars)
slides.lead: Phakathi kuka-1779 no-1879 kwaba khona uchungechunge lwezimpi phakathi kwabakoloni nemiphakathi yamaXhosa emngceleni waseMpumalanga Koloni (Eastern Cape).

blocks.text: Izazi-mlando zibala cishe **Izimpi Zomngcele eziyisishiyagalolunye** phakathi neminyaka engaba yikhulu. Kule yunithi sibheka lezo zempi zasekuqaleni kwawo-**1800**. Impi ngayinye yayivame ukuphetha ngokulahlekelwa kwamaXhosa umhlaba omningi, njengoba ikoloni yayiqhubeza umngcele wayo uye kude empumalanga.

items: Lezi zimpi zazibuye zibizwe ngokuthi iZimpi Zomngcele WaseKapa (Cape Frontier Wars) noma iZimpi ZamaXhosa (Xhosa Wars).
Zaziyingxabano eyodwa ende kodwa izingxabano eziningi ezehlukene, kunokuthula phakathi kwazo.
Ngokuhamba kwesikhathi iphethini yayicacile: umhlaba wawusuka ekulawulweni ngamaXhosa uye ekolonini.

media.alt: Umngcele wekoloni ophawulwe ngomugqa onamachashaza ohamba uye ngakwesokudla ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='10' y='30' width='60' height='100' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='70' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='#cbb98f' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='110' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='#cfc094' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='70' y1='24' x2='70' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><line x1='110' y1='24' x2='110' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><line x1='150' y1='24' x2='150' y2='136' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><path d='M74 20 L146 20 M138 14 L146 20 L138 26' fill='none' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nika isithombe esibanzi ngaphambi kwemininingwane. Abafundi abadingi ukukhumbula zonke izimpi eziyisishiyagalolunye; badinga ukuqonda iphethini - ukungqubuzana okuphindaphindekayo, impi ngayinye iphetha ngomngcele oqhutshelwa empumalanga namaXhosa elahlekelwa umhlaba. [SME] Izazi-mlando zihlukene ngokuthi lezi zimpi eziyisishiyagalolunye zibalwa futhi zibhalwa ngezinsuku ezinjani; qinisekisa inani nezinsuku ofuna abafundi bazisebenzise.

slides.title: Baxoshwa eZuurveld
slides.lead: Amabutho amaNgisi axosha izinkulungwane zamaXhosa awela uMfula iFish ukuze avulele umhlaba wekoloni.

blocks.text: I-**Zuurveld** kwakuyisiqephu somhlaba osentshonalanga koMfula iFish lapho amaXhosa nabakoloni babehlala khona ndawonye. Ngo-1811-1812, uMbusi u-**Sir John Cradock** wayala amasosha amaNgisi nabalingani bawo ukuba **axoshe amaXhosa** futhi awaphoqe aye empumalanga awele umfula.

items: Ikoloni yayifuna indawo evulekile ecacile eyisivikelo (buffer zone) emngceleni wayo osempumalanga.
Ukuze kuqashwe umngcele omusha, idolobha iGrahamstown lasungulwa ngo-1812.
Imindeni eminingi yamaXhosa yalahlekelwa amakhaya namadlelo eyayiwasebenzise iminyaka.

media.alt: Abantu benezinkomo behanjiswa bewela umfula beya empumalanga.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M112 20 q-8 50 4 62 q10 20 -4 58' fill='none' stroke='#4a6d8c' stroke-width='8'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='150' cy='60' r='8'/><rect x='144' y='70' width='12' height='26'/><circle cx='178' cy='72' r='8'/><rect x='172' y='82' width='12' height='26'/></g><ellipse cx='196' cy='108' rx='16' ry='9' fill='#5c3a22'/><path d='M150 120 L200 120 M192 114 L200 120 L192 126' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi yisibonelo esiqondile sokwephucwa umhlaba. Chaza 'indawo eyisivikelo' (buffer zone) - ikoloni yayifuna umhlaba ongenamuntu phakathi kwayo namaXhosa. Qaphela ukusungulwa kweGrahamstown (namuhla iMakhanda) njengedolobha lasempini lomngcele. Phatha lokhu ngenhlonipho: imindeni yangempela yaphoqwa ukuba iphume emhlabeni wayo. Buza abafundi ukuthi bacabanga ukuthi amaXhosa azizwa kanjani ngokuxoshwa.

slides.title: Abahlali BamaNgisi baka-1820 (1820 British Settlers)
slides.lead: I-Britain yathumela cishe abahlali abangama-4 000 ukuba bahlale emngceleni njengesihlangu somuntu sokuvikela ikoloni.

blocks.text: Ngo-1820 uhulumeni wamaNgisi wasiza cishe abahlali abangama-**4 000** ukuba bathuthele eMpumalanga Koloni (Eastern Cape). Banikwa amapulazi endaweni yomngcele, ngenxenye ukuze kukhuliswe ikoloni, ngenxenye ukuze **kuvikelwe umngcele** kumaXhosa.

items: Abahlali abaningi bahlupheka: umhlaba wawunzima ukuwulima futhi ukungqubuzana kwakuseduze.
Abanye bayeka ukulima base beqala amadolobha, amabhizinisi kanye namaphephandaba.
Ukufika kwabo kwengeza ingcindezi emhlabeni wamaXhosa eduze komngcele.

media.alt: Umkhumbi wehla eduze kolwandle kunenqola nendlwana yasepulazini ogwini.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='104' width='240' height='56' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='92' width='240' height='14' fill='#a8bcae'/><g><rect x='40' y='58' width='6' height='40' fill='#5c3a22'/><path d='M46 60 L84 60 L64 96 L46 96 Z' fill='#efe6d2' stroke='#8a6a44'/><path d='M30 96 L96 96 L86 108 L40 108 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/></g><rect x='150' y='96' width='40' height='24' fill='#b7a98d'/><path d='M148 96 L170 78 L192 96 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='165' y='104' width='10' height='16' fill='#5c3a22'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza uhlelo lwamaNgisi: beka abahlali emngceleni ukuze uqiniswe futhi uvikelwe. Qaphela ukuthi abahlali abaningi baba nesikhathi esinzima base bephendukela emabhizinisini asedolobheni, okwaholela ekukhuleni kweGrahamstown nasembhalweni wezindaba womngcele. Gcina ukulingana: abahlali ngokuvamile babeyimindeni ehluphekile evamile, kodwa ukufika kwabo kwakhula ingcindezi emhlabeni wamaXhosa.

slides.title: UMakhanda nokuhlaselwa kweGrahamstown
slides.lead: Ngo-1819 ibutho lamaXhosa eliholwa umholi wempi nomprofethi uMakhanda lahlasela idolobha lomngcele iGrahamstown.

blocks.text: AmaXhosa ayehlukene phakathi kwabaholi ababili, u-**Ngqika** nomalume wakhe u-**Ndlambe**. Lapho amaNgisi esekela uNgqika, amabutho kaNdlambe amelana. Ngo-1819 iqhawe elingumprofethi u-**Makhanda** (obuye abizwe ngokuthi uNxele noma uMakana) lahola ibutho elikhulu lamaXhosa ekuhlaseleni okunesibindi i-**Grahamstown**.

items: Ukuhlasela kwahluleka, futhi amaXhosa alahlekelwa kakhulu.
UMakhanda wazinikela wavalelwa eSiqhingini iRobben (Robben Island), lapho aminza khona ezama ukubaleka.
Ngemva kwempi ikoloni yathatha umhlaba omningi kakhulu, yakha indawo 'engathathi hlangothi' amaXhosa ayengavumelekile ukungena kuyo.

media.alt: Umuntu oyedwa omude ophakamise umkhonto umi phambi kwedolobhana elinodonga.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#b7a98d'><rect x='150' y='84' width='70' height='36'/><rect x='160' y='72' width='16' height='12'/><rect x='192' y='72' width='16' height='12'/></g><circle cx='60' cy='52' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='54' y='66' width='12' height='40' fill='#2f5233'/><line x1='74' y1='30' x2='74' y2='108' stroke='#5c3a22' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M74 30 L70 44 L78 44 Z' fill='#7a7a7a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukwehlukana phakathi kukaNgqika noNdlambe nokuthi ukubandakanyeka kwamaNgisi kwakujulisa kanjani ukungqubuzana. Veza uMakhanda njengomholi obalulekile nomprofethi, hhayi nje umhlaseli. Ukuvalelwa kwakhe nokushona kwakhe eSiqhingini iRobben kumenza aphawu lokuqala lokumelana. Phawula futhi iphethini: ngemva kwempi, ikoloni yathatha umhlaba omningi. [SME] Ubukhulu bebutho likaMakhanda buvame ukubalwa njengecishe abangu-10 000; qinisekisa inani ngaphambi kokuba ulisho kubafundi.

slides.title: Abasizi futhi bayingxenye yokunqoba
slides.lead: Abefundisi bevangeli bafika bezofundisa nokuphendukisa abantu enkolweni - kodwa umsebenzi wabo wabuye wavulela indlela yokulawulwa yikoloni.

items: Bakha iziteshi zezenkolo (mission stations), izikole namasonto.
Babhala phansi ulimi lwesiXhosa futhi bafundisa ukufunda nokubhala.
Kwesinye isikhathi bavikela abantu base-Afrika ekuphathweni kabuhlungu.
Bacindezela abantu ukuba bayeke izinkolelo namasiko abo.
Iziteshi zezenkolo ngokuvamile zaba yizinyawo zokungena zamandla ekoloni.
Imibiko namamephu abo asiza ikoloni ukuqonda nokulawula umhlaba.

slides.notes: Abefundisi bevangeli bayisibonelo esihle sendikimba yokuthi 'ukubambisana nokungqubuzana' kuyinkimbinkimbi. Amaqembu anjenge-London Missionary Society (uDkt Johannes van der Kemp, kamuva uDkt John Philip) kwesinye isikhathi ayekhulumela amalungelo amaKhoikhoi namaXhosa, kodwa umsebenzi wezenkolo wabuye wathobisa inkululeko yase-Afrika futhi wenza lula ukwanda kwekoloni. Khuthaza abafundi ukuba babambe imibono yomibili kanyekanye kunokwahlulela abefundisi njengabahle noma ababi.

slides.title: Ukubulawa kweNkosi uHintsa
slides.lead: Ngo-1835 amaNgisi abulala inkosi enkulu yamaXhosa, uHintsa, phakathi nempi yomhlaba nezinkomo.

blocks.text: Ngo-1834 impi yaqhuma futhi lapho amabutho amaXhosa, ethukuthele ngokulahlekelwa umhlaba, angena ngamandla ekolonini. Phakathi nokulwa amaNgisi abamba **inkosi enkulu uHintsa ka Phalo**. NgoMeyi wango-1835 wa-**dutshulwa wabulawa amasosha amaNgisi** eyisiboshwa, isenzo esethusa futhi sathukuthelisa amaXhosa.

items: Impi yabangela ukulahleka okukhulu kwempilo nezinkomo ezinhlangothini zombili.
Ukufa kukaHintsa kwaba aphawu elihlala njalo lokungabi nabulungiswa kwekoloni.
Ikoloni yaphinde yaqhubeza umngcele wayo uye empumalanga ngemva kwempi.

media.alt: Umkhonto ophukile ubekwe phezu kwehawu, kunelanga eliphansi ngemuva, kuphawula ukufa komholi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M0 118 L240 118 L240 160 L0 160 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='120' cy='118' r='34' fill='#e0913a' opacity='0.6'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='26' ry='40' fill='#5c3a22'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='10' ry='30' fill='#efe6d2'/><line x1='70' y1='70' x2='104' y2='104' stroke='#7a7a7a' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='138' y1='118' x2='172' y2='150' stroke='#7a7a7a' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lona ngumzuzu obucayi - phatha ngokuzotha nangamaqiniso. UHintsa wayeyinkosi enkulu yamaXhosa; ukubulawa kwakhe eyisiboshwa kwabhekwa njengokukhaphela futhi kusewumlando obuhlungu. Gxila ekutheni kungani kwakubalulekile: kwajulisa ukumelana kwamaXhosa nokungathembani. Gwema imininingwane ebucayi; iphuzu eliyinhloko ukungabi nabulungiswa nesithunzi sakho eside. [SME] Izimo eziqondile zokufa kukaHintsa nokushwabadelwa kwakhe ziphikiswana ngazo izazi-mlando; gcina indaba yasekilasini icophelele futhi uqinisekise amagama.

slides.title: Umholi owalwela ukugcina umhlaba
slides.lead: INkosi uMaqoma yahola ukumelana kwamaXhosa amashumi eminyaka futhi yashona iyisiboshwa eSiqhingini iRobben (Robben Island).

blocks.text: Umhlaba wawungowethu, futhi asisoze sayeka ukuzwa ukuthi wathathwa kithi.

U-**Maqoma**, indodana yeNkosi uNgqika, wayengomunye wabaholi bezempi bamaXhosa abanekhono elikhulu ezimpini zomngcele. Waxoshwa emhlabeni wakhe endaweni yaseKat River futhi wachitha ingxenye enkulu yempilo yakhe emelana nokwanda kwekoloni. Kamuva wavalelwa eSiqhingini iRobben (**Robben Island**), lapho ashona khona ngo-1873.

items: Wasebenzisa amagquma nehlathi lomngcele ngobuqili ekulweni namabutho amakhulu.
Impilo yakhe ikhombisa izindleko zabantu zokulahlekelwa umhlaba, kaninginingi.
Namuhla ukhunjulwa njengeqhawe lokumelana.

slides.notes: UMaqoma unika abafundi umuntu oyedwa okhumbulekayo ozokwakha indikimba yokumelana nokwephucwa umhlaba. Qaphela ukuthi lo mbhalo ocashuniwe uwukuhumusha okubamba umuzwa wamaXhosa wokulahlekelwa, hhayi umbhalo oqinisekisiwe oqondile - wethule njengoba unjalo. Xhumanisa ukuvalelwa kwakhe eSiqhingini iRobben noMakhanda ngaphambili, ukhombise umugqa omude wabaholi bokumelana ababevalelwe lapho. [SME] Qinisekisa ukuthi ukhululekile ukusebenzisa umbhalo ocashuniwe ohunyushiwe, noma uwushintshe ngomunye onomthombo.

slides.title: Umngcele oshintshayo, 1806-1836

blocks.alt: Uhla lwezikhathi lwezehlakalo ezibalulekile zomngcele kusukela ngo-1806 kuya ku-1836.

events.label: UMakhanda uhlasela iGrahamstown; kuthathwa umhlaba omningi
INkosi uHintsa iyabulawa ngesikhathi seMpi Yesithupha Yomngcele
UFuduko Olukhulu (Great Trek) luyaqala njengoba amaBhunu eshiya ikoloni

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lolu hlelo lwezikhathi ukuhlanganisa. Cela abafundi ukuba balandele iphethini kuzo zonke izehlakalo: ukungqubuzana ngakunye kuvame ukuphetha ngomngcele oqhutshelwa empumalanga namaXhosa elahlekelwa umhlaba. Qaphela uFuduko Olukhulu (Great Trek) ekugcineni, abafundi abangase balufunde ngokulandelayo - lwavela ngenxenye ezingxabaneni zomngcele nasezinguqukweni zomthetho wekoloni.

slides.title: Esikufundile
slides.lead: Umngcele waseKapa wawuyindawo yokubambisana nokungqubuzana - ukuhweba nomshado, kodwa futhi impi nokwephucwa umhlaba.

blocks.text: Emngceleni waseMpumalanga Koloni (Eastern Cape), imiphakathi yamaXhosa, ama-trekboer, amaKhoikhoi, abahlali bamaNgisi kanye nabefundisi bevangeli **babelana** ngomhlaba ngokuhweba nangempilo yansuku zonke, kodwa futhi **baxabana** ngomhlaba, izinkomo namandla. Impi ngemva kwempi yaphetha ngamaXhosa elahlekelwa umhlaba, kanti umngcele wekoloni waqhubeka nokuya empumalanga.

blocks.question: Nikeza izibonelo ezimbili zokubambisana phakathi kwamaqembu ahlukene emngceleni waseKapa.
Chaza izizathu ezimbili zokuthi kungani ukungqubuzana kwakhula emngceleni ekuqaleni kwawo-1800.
Khetha umholi oyedwa (uMakhanda, uHintsa noma uMaqoma) uchaze ukuthi kungani ekhunjulwa.

slides.notes: Phetha ngokubuyela ezingxenyeni ezimbili zesihloko - ukubambisana nokungqubuzana - ukuze abafundi bakwazi ukuzibamba zombili emqondweni. Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliwe noma ingxoxo; ukwabiwa kwamamaki kulandela ukubhala kwe-CAPS kwezimpendulo ezimfushane nezindima. Khumbuza abafundi ukuthi lo mlando womngcele usiza ukuchaza izehlakalo zakamuva ezinjengoFuduko Olukhulu (Great Trek) nokulahlekelwa umhlaba wase-Afrika kulo lonke iNingizimu Afrika.
